mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT b.board_code, b.board_title, b.board_contents, b.board_read_count, b.board_ref, b.board_ref_lvl, b.board_ref_step, b.reg_emp_no, b.reg_date, b.category, e.emp_name, e.user_access, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl > 0) AS reply_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) AS answer_count FROM internal_board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no AND b.category != '공지사항' WHERE b.board_ref_lvl = 0
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND (b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) > 0
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) = 0
ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.category = '공지사항' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, b.board_ref DESC, b.board_ref_step ASC ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no AND b.category != '공지사항' WHERE b.board_ref_lvl = 0
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND (b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) > 0
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) = 0

SELECT b.board_code, b.board_title, b.board_contents, b.board_read_count, b.board_ref, b.board_ref_lvl, b.board_ref_step, b.reg_emp_no, b.reg_date, b.category, e.emp_name, e.user_access FROM internal_board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE b.board_ref = (SELECT board_ref FROM internal_board WHERE board_code = #{boardCode}) ORDER BY b.board_ref_step ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO internal_board ( board_code, board_title, board_contents, board_read_count, board_ref, board_ref_lvl, board_ref_step, reg_emp_no, reg_date, category ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_code), 0) + 1 FROM internal_board), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, 0, #{boardRef}, 1, (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_ref_step), 0) + 1 FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = #{boardRef}), #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE, '일반' )

INSERT INTO internal_board ( board_code, board_title, board_contents, board_read_count, board_ref, board_ref_lvl, board_ref_step, reg_emp_no, reg_date, category ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_code), 0) + 1 FROM internal_board), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, 0, #{boardRef}, 2, (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_ref_step), 0) + 1 FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = #{boardRef}), #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE, '일반' )
mapper.select: SELECT reg_emp_no FROM internal_board WHERE board_code = #{boardCode} AND board_ref_lvl = 0

SELECT b.board_code, b.board_title, b.board_contents, b.board_read_count, b.board_ref, b.board_ref_lvl, b.board_ref_step, b.reg_emp_no, b.reg_date, b.category, e.emp_name, e.user_access, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM internal_board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl > 0) AS reply_count FROM internal_board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE b.board_ref_lvl = 0 AND b.category = '공지사항' ORDER BY b.board_ref DESC
